tldr_zh: OpenAI與HP擴大合作，中國超級電腦重奪全球第一，福特因AI失利重招老工程師。
tldr_en: OpenAI expands HP partnership, China reclaims top supercomputer spot, Ford rehires veteran engineers as AI falls short.

items.title_zh: OpenAI與HP推進Frontier戰略合作夥伴關係
items.title_en: HP Inc. Launches Frontier Strategic Partnership with OpenAI
items.summary_zh: HP Inc.宣布擴大與OpenAI的Frontier合作，在客戶體驗、軟體開發和企業營運等領域部署AI解決方案。此合作展示主流科技企業對AI整合的重視，標誌著企業級AI應用進一步加速。
items.summary_en: HP Inc. expands its Frontier partnership with OpenAI to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations. This collaboration reflects how mainstream technology companies are accelerating AI integration across their business operations.

items.title_zh: 中國GLM-5.2在網安領域追上Mythos表現
items.title_en: China's Z.ai GLM-5.2 Matches Mythos in Cybersecurity Tasks
items.summary_zh: 中國智譜AI(Z.ai)發布開源權重模型GLM-5.2，研究人員聲稱其在漏洞發現和網安場景表現與Mythos相當。雖然GLM在通用任務上仍落後Anthropic和OpenAI，但顯示中國模型與西方先進模型的能力差距大幅縮小。
items.summary_en: China's Zhipu AI released open-weight GLM-5.2, with researchers claiming it matches Mythos in bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags in general tasks, the development shows China has dramatically narrowed the capability gap with Western AI models.

items.title_zh: Suno推Spark孵化器支持獨立音樂人
items.title_en: Suno Launches Spark Incubator Program for Independent Artists
items.summary_zh: AI音樂平台Suno推出Spark孵化器計畫，為未簽約的獨立音樂人提供資金補助、導師指導和行銷支持。此舉標誌Suno不僅致力於AI音樂生成，更想打造音樂流媒體平台並扶植新興藝人。
items.summary_en: Suno launched the Spark incubator program providing grants, mentorship, and marketing support to unsigned independent artists. The initiative shows Suno's ambition beyond AI music generation, aiming to become a streaming destination and discover new talent.

items.title_zh: 中國LineShine超級電腦重奪全球第一寶座
items.title_en: China Reclaims World's Fastest Supercomputer Title with LineShine
items.summary_zh: 儘管受美國出口管制限制，中國超級電腦LineShine在TOP500排名中首次超越美國El Capitan，重新奪得全球最快超級電腦寶座。此為中國自2018年後首度重奪該位置，展示其在高效能運算領域的進展。
items.summary_en: Despite US export restrictions on advanced computing components, China's LineShine supercomputer has reclaimed the number-one spot on the TOP500 ranking, surpassing US El Capitan for the first time since 2018. This marks a significant achievement in China's high-performance computing capabilities.

items.title_zh: 檢控官用ChatGPT日誌作為縱火案證據
items.title_en: Prosecutors Use ChatGPT Logs as Evidence in Palisades Wildfire Arson Trial
items.summary_zh: 在加州帕沙迪納野火縱火案審理中，檢控官除使用位置數據和監視影像外，還利用被告的ChatGPT使用記錄作為證據。此案凸顯AI日誌在刑事調查中的新角色和法律應用潛力。
items.summary_en: Prosecutors in the Palisades wildfire arson trial referenced ChatGPT logs as evidence alongside iPhone location data and surveillance footage. This case highlights the emerging role of AI interaction logs in criminal investigations.

items.title_zh: 福特因AI不足重新招聘資深工程師
items.title_en: Ford Rehires Veteran Engineers After AI Development Falls Short
items.summary_zh: 福特汽車因AI在產品開發中表現不達預期，重新招聘資深工程師。福特主管坦言，單純引入AI並未如預想提升產品品質，須回歸人類工程師專業知識。此案例反映AI應用在工業設計仍需與傳統專業結合。
items.summary_en: Ford is rehiring veteran 'gray beard' engineers after discovering that AI alone cannot produce high-quality automotive products as expected. The company acknowledged that introducing AI without experienced engineers' expertise resulted in suboptimal outcomes.

items.title_zh: Micron被華爾街視為下一個英偉達
items.title_en: Wall Street Sees US Memory Maker Micron as Next Nvidia
items.summary_zh: 華爾街投資人看好美國記憶體廠商Micron成為下一個英偉達，成為AI相關公司中的成長機會。Micron作為AI晶片供應鏈的關鍵角色，獲得市場高度關注。
items.summary_en: Wall Street investors view US memory manufacturer Micron as the next potential AI boom winner, seeking public companies with similar growth prospects to Nvidia. Micron's critical role in the AI chip supply chain attracts significant market interest.

items.title_zh: 加州法律規範串流廣告音量7月1日生效
items.title_en: California Law Targeting Loud Streaming Ads Takes Effect on July 1
items.summary_zh: 加州針對串流廣告過度音量的法律將於7月1日生效，要求廣告音量不得超過節目音量。此舉回應用戶長期對串流平台廣告突然提高音量的投訴。
items.summary_en: California's law limiting streaming ad volume takes effect on July 1, requiring ads to not exceed the volume of surrounding content. The regulation addresses consumer complaints about excessively loud advertisements on streaming platforms.

items.title_en: Linux Reveals Critical DirtyClone Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
items.summary_zh: Linux近期曝露新的本機權限提升漏洞DirtyClone，CVSS嚴重度評分高達8.8分。JFrog發現此漏洞，與6月初發布的其他權限提升漏洞共同威脅Linux系統安全。
items.summary_en: Linux has revealed a critical local privilege escalation vulnerability called DirtyClone with a CVSS severity score of 8.8. Discovered by JFrog, the vulnerability joins other recent Linux privilege escalation issues threatening system security.

items.title_zh: 委內瑞拉雙地震逾千人罹難，救援進入關鍵時期
items.title_en: Venezuela Earthquakes Kill Over 1,000 as Rescue Operations Continue
items.summary_zh: 委內瑞拉遭兩次地震襲擊，死亡人數已超千人。救援人員仍在廢墟中搜尋倖存者，兩名男孩和家人被救出，但隨著時間流逝，尋獲倖存者的機率逐漸下降。
items.summary_en: Venezuela's twin earthquakes have killed over 1,000 people, with rescue operations continuing at critical stages. Rescue teams have pulled several survivors from rubble, but the window for finding survivors is rapidly closing.

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪釀1300死，德國連破高溫紀錄
items.title_en: Europe's Heatwave Linked to 1,300 Deaths, Germany Sets Record 41.7°C
items.summary_zh: WHO警告歐洲熱浪已造成1,300人死亡。德國連續三天刷新高溫紀錄，最高達攝氏41.7度，捷克更達41.9度。歐洲多地面臨野火蔓延、溺水死亡等危機，WHO指歐洲對高溫準備不足。
items.summary_en: WHO reports Europe's heatwave has caused 1,300 deaths as Germany hits record 41.7°C for three consecutive days. The extreme temperatures have sparked wildfires, drowning deaths, and raised concerns about Europe's unpreparedness for high-heat events.
